\tzpentry{ID3300}{Magnetic Flux Curl Field Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3300 introduces Magnetic Flux Curl Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \mathbf{u}( \mathbf{r},t) &= \nabla \Phi_ \text{ac} + \nabla \times \mathbf{ \Psi}_ \text{ac} \\ \nabla \cdot \mathbf{ \Psi}_ \text{ac} &= 0 \quad \text{(Coulomb gauge)} \end{align}
